description.para: Either from the GUI or derived from DC_ReturnTotalLengthIncrease()

detaileddescription.para: List of active channels per type
All waves here use active channel indexing like DataConfigurationResult::DACList and can thus be all indexed together.

briefdescription.para: Headstage of DAC if associated, NaN iff unassociated.

detaileddescription.para: What type of operation is done. Either DAQ(DATA_ACQUISITION_MODE) or TP(TEST_PULSE_MODE)

briefdescription.para: Number of DAC's, always larger than 0.
Number of ADC's, always larger than 0.
Number of TTLs, can be zero.
Length of the DataConfigurationResult::testPulse wave in points.
Offset in points where the stimulus set starts in the DAQ data wave.

detaileddescription.para: Headstage of ADC if associated, NaN iff unassociated Uses active channel indexing like DataConfigurationResult::ADCList

briefdescription.para: Structure to hold the result of data configuration from DC_GetConfiguration()
